summary: Completed testing of Dentu dental clinic app rebranding and role-based navigation features. Found mixed branding (both 'Dentu' and old 'Clínica Dental' present), working authentication, and functional CRUD interfaces.

ui_bugs.issue: Mixed branding - both 'Dentu' and old 'Clínica Dental' text present on login page
Session management inconsistent - frequent redirects back to login

integration_issues.issue: Navigation correctly shows role-based items but user was registered as admin but got doctor navigation (Mi Panel instead of Dashboard)

design_issues.issue: Login page shows 'Gestión integral de tu clínica dental' instead of 'Dentu' specific messaging

passed_tests: Dentu branding visible in header and logo areas
Role-based navigation structure implemented correctly in code
Doctors page has CRUD interface with form modal
Patients page has CRUD interface with medical alerts section
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix mixed branding - remove 'Clínica Dental' text and replace with 'Dentu' messaging on login page. 2) Fix role assignment in registration - admin role should get admin navigation (Dashboard, Doctores) not doctor navigation (Mi Panel). 3) Improve session management to prevent frequent login redirects.
success_percentage: Frontend: 70% - Core functionality works but branding and role assignment need fixes
